english: Om — Golden-hued, beautiful, wearing garlands of gold and silver
roman: Om Hiranyavarnam Harenim suvarna rajata srajam

hindi: चन्द्रां हिरण्मयीं लक्ष्मीं जातवेदो म आवह॥
english: The moon-like, golden Lakshmi — O Jatavedas, bring her to me
roman: Chandram hiranyamayim Lakshmim Jatavedo ma avaha

english: Bring that Lakshmi to me O Jatavedas, she who never departs
In whom I find gold, cattle, horses and men
roman: Yasyam hiranyam vindeyam gam ashvam purush anaham

english: She who is preceded by horses, surrounded by chariots, who awakens to the sound of elephants
roman: Ashva purvam ratha madhyam hastinada prabodhinim

english: I invoke Goddess Sri — may the Goddess Sri delight in me
roman: Shriyam Devim upahvaye Shrir ma Devi jushatam

english: She who is gold in hue, moist with grace, blazing, satisfied and satisfying
roman: Kam so smitam hiranya prakaram ardram jvalantim triptam tarpayantim

english: Standing on a lotus, lotus-complexioned — I invoke here that Sri
roman: Padme sthitam padma varnam tam ihopahvaye shriyam
